Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x502A "SUPERMANTHEGAME-4E00-502A" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $4e00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Superman - The Game.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $4E00 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts. This fixes an occasional lock-up suffered by the original when starting up the game. It also sets the correct border and screen colours.
